CO (cleanout) label at the bottom-right corner of the plan

warnings: See the sibling 'wc3_plan' file's warning re: an in-plan room-label digit ambiguity between 'ห้องน้ำ 2' and 'ห้องน้ำ 3' on that other view -- this view's own caption ('ห้องน้ำ 2') is used as printed and is the clearer of the two captions to read, but flagged together for a combined human review since a mislabel on either view would mean the two are swapped.
This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic underfloor-piping detail, explicitly noted '( ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น )'.

Exact fixture layout and precise pipe routing paths are only partially legible at this resolution -- positions and pipe-size callouts are best-effort, not measured coordinates; flagged for zoom-review.
grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true -- this is not on the building's structural plan grid.
